+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    data_dir = Path(args.data_path)

+

+        if i >= args.limit:

+def _scale_grid_to_abs(nums: List[float], width: float, height: float) -> List[float]:

+    out = []

+    for i, v in enumerate(nums):

+        if i % 2 == 0:

+            out.append(v / GRID_SIZE * width)

+        else:

+            out.append(v / GRID_SIZE * height)

+    return out

+

+

+def _parse_attr_point(text: str) -> Optional[ParsedPrediction]:

+    m = re.search(r"<point[^>]*x1\s*=\s*\"?([\d.]+)\"?[^>]*y1\s*=\s*\"?([\d.]+)\"?[^>]*>", text, flags=re.I)

+    if m:

+        return ParsedPrediction("point", [float(m.group(1)), float(m.group(2))], text)

+    m = re.search(r"<point[^>]*x\s*=\s*\"?([\d.]+)\"?[^>]*y\s*=\s*\"?([\d.]+)\"?[^>]*>", text, flags=re.I)

+    if m:

+        return ParsedPrediction("point", [float(m.group(1)), float(m.group(2))], text)

+    return None

+

+

+def parse_prediction_text(text: str) -> Optional[ParsedPrediction]:

+    if not text:

+        return None

+    t = text.strip()

+

+    attr = _parse_attr_point(t)

+        return attr

+

+        ("box", r"<bbox>\s*\(?\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*,\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*\)?\s*,?\s*\(?\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*,\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*\)?\s*</bbox>"),

+        ("point", r"point\s*[:=]\s*\(?\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*,\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*\)?"),

+        ("box", r"bbox\s*[:=]\s*\(?\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*,\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*,\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*,\s*([\d.\-]+)\s*\)?"),

     ]

-    for pat in point_tag_patterns:

         if m:

-    ]

-

+            vals = [float(g) for g in m.groups()]

+            return ParsedPrediction(kind, vals, t)

+def prediction_to_abs(parsed: ParsedPrediction, width: float, height: float) -> Dict[str, List[float]]:

+def fallback_from_text(text: str, width: float, height: float) -> Dict[str, List[float]]:

+    nums = _extract_numbers(text or "")

+    if len(nums) >= 2:

+        return {"point": clip_point(scaled[0], scaled[1], width, height)}

+    return {"point": [width / 2.0, height / 2.0]}

+

+def generate_prediction(model, processor, image: Image.Image, instruction: str, width: float, height: float) -> Dict[str, List[float]]:

     return pred
